title: A Quiet Place: Day One - Key Information
text: This prequel spinoff follows the franchise established by John Krasinski's original 2018 film. Rather than continuing the Abbott family's story, it explores where it all began during the alien invasion's first day in New York City. Michael Sarnoski, known for directing Pig, took over after original screenwriter Jeff Nichols departed the project. Krasinski remains involved as producer but doesn't appear in the film. The film centers on the chaotic day when extraterrestrial creatures invade Manhattan, descending on the noisiest city in the world with their noise-tracking abilities. The trailer, released February 7, 2024, shows Nyong'o navigating the bustling city as the catastrophe unfolds. Cast: Lupita Nyong'o leads the ensemble in her second major tentpole role outside the Black Panther franchise. Joseph Quinn co-stars following his Stranger Things breakthrough. Djimon Hounsou returns, reprising his character from A Quiet Place: Part II. The original 2018 film achieved remarkable success, earning nearly $341 million worldwide on a budget under $30 million.
